s: In 2011, Brett Lawrie suited up for TOR as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.293, OPS 0.953, HR 9, RBI 25, WAR 2.600.
In 2012, Brett Lawrie suited up for TOR as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.273, OPS 0.729, HR 11, RBI 48, WAR 1.900.
In 2013, Brett Lawrie suited up for TOR as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.254, OPS 0.712, HR 11, RBI 46, WAR 1.600.
In 2014, Brett Lawrie suited up for TOR as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.247, OPS 0.722, HR 12, RBI 38, WAR 1.600.
Changed teams after the previous season (TOR -> OAK).
In 2015, Brett Lawrie suited up for OAK as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.260, OPS 0.706, HR 16, RBI 60, WAR 0.900. Notable context: Joined OAK.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> CHW).
In 2016, Brett Lawrie suited up for CHW as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.248, OPS 0.723, HR 12, RBI 36, WAR 0.900. Notable context: Joined CHW.
